description: Adversarial invariant for the civic/admin manual sample: urban sewer inspection must stay scoped to sewer/drainage maintenance rather than aqueduct infrastructure or generic construction.

checks.reason: The source-checked node is anchored to Agrippa's reported 33 BCE inspection of the Cloaca Maxima system.
Sewer inspection presupposes an existing sewer/drainage system.
Aqueducts are water-supply infrastructure, not a prerequisite for sewer inspection.
Generic construction is upstream of sewer creation; the direct prerequisite for sewer inspection is the existing sewer/drainage system.
